name: Dark Horror Descent
description: Preset Dark Horror Descent with default tone, themes, and 3-arc structure.

text_areas.logline: A creeping horror devours reason and safety.
text_areas.setting: An isolated region haunted by forgotten rites and hungry entities.
text_areas.main_objective: Survive escalating supernatural threats and uncover the origin point.
text_areas.stakes: If the source remains active, entire communities vanish without trace.

arcs.name: Arc I — Inciting Pressure
arcs.objective: Establish allies and identify first leverage point.

arcs.name: Arc II — Escalation
arcs.summary: Opposition adapts and raises the cost.
arcs.objective: Disrupt enemy momentum and protect key assets.

arcs.name: Arc III — Final Turning Point
arcs.summary: The central conflict reaches decisive climax.
arcs.objective: Resolve the core threat and define long-term consequences.
